name: ExtensionRequirements_Actor
title: R5: Actor for these requirements (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Requirements.actor` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Requirements.actor` 0..* `canonical(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/ActorDefinition)`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
* R5 `Requirements.actor` 0..* `canonical(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/ActorDefinition)`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Requirements.actor` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Requirements` is not mapped.
Element `Requirements.actor` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.comment:
Element `Requirements.actor` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Requirements` is not mapped.
Element `Requirements.actor` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
If more than one actor is specified, then it's up to the statements to describe in narrative if they don't apply to all actors.

element.definition: An actor these requirements are in regard to.
element.comment: If more than one actor is specified, then it's up to the statements to describe in narrative if they don't apply to all actors.
